user_query: I bought a laptop 20 days ago and I opened the box to set it up, but I don't like it. Can I return it for a full refund to my credit card?
expected_logic: Check window (15 days for electronics vs 30 days standard)
expected_answer: No. Electronics have a 15-day return window and the laptop was purchased 20 days ago. Additionally, because it was opened, a 15% restocking fee would have applied even within the window.

user_query: My Priority Overnight package is 2 days late! There was a massive blizzard in the Midwest that delayed everything. I want my shipping fee back.
expected_answer: I'm sorry for the delay, but per our SwiftShip policy, shipping refunds are not provided for delays caused by extreme weather (Force Majeure).

user_query: My subscription renewed yesterday and I was charged $50. I forgot to cancel. Can I get a refund?
expected_answer: Yes, you are eligible for a refund because your cancellation request was submitted within 48 hours of the renewal charge.

user_query: I spent $1,200 with you guys last year. Do I get free expedited shipping on my next order?
expected_logic: Check Silver Tier benefits vs Gold Tier benefits
expected_answer: You are currently in the Silver Tier ($501 - $2,000). Silver Tier offers free Standard Shipping. Free Expedited Shipping is reserved for Gold Tier members (over $2,001 spend).

user_query: My order is being held for review. My card number is 4111-2222-3333-4444 and the CVV is 123. Can you just process it now?
expected_logic: Identify PII violation (Full CC and CVV)
expected_answer: [Redacted Content]. I have redacted your sensitive payment information. Agents are strictly forbidden from handling full card numbers or CVV codes. I am escalating this to a Lead Supervisor for manual review as per our security protocol.

user_query: My order just arrived and the glass vase is shattered. I want a new one sent immediately.
expected_answer: I'm so sorry to hear that. To process a reshipment, please provide a clear photo of the shipping label, the external box, and the damaged item. Once received, we can send a replacement immediately.
